creator: misho@elwix.org
text:
Created attachment 147421
Patch for issue

When start compiling 64bits kernel with alq support we faced with this error.

/home/fbsd_work.src/src/sys/net80211/ieee80211_alq.c:89:7: error: format specifies type 'int' but the argument has type 'unsigned long' [-Werror,-Wformat]
                    sizeof(struct ieee80211_alq_rec));
                    ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
*** [ieee80211_alq.o] Error code 1
